scope: UEA Diamondback batch only; old quotes excluded
sources: UEA Diamondback Config Sanity Check Review v6.docx

diamondback_library_config_matches_email.summary: The email asks for 8 LTO-10 drives per library, but the Diamondback config shows 10 drives per library.

cartridge_requirement_evidenced.summary: A separate tape-media quote now evidences 2 x 300 LTO-10 cartridges across the batch.
cartridge_requirement_evidenced.detail: The media quote contains two repeated blocks of 15 x labeled 20-packs, i.e. 300 cartridges per block and 600 total, which is consistent with 2 lots each needing 300 carts.
caveats: The cartridges are evidenced in a separate media quote, not inside the Diamondback library config itself.
The exact one-to-one mapping of one 300-cart set to each library is inferred from the repeated structure and naming, not explicitly labelled by library.
The media folder/file name says NO-VOLSER, but the content clearly includes VOLSER characters DUM000.

san_switch_config_match.summary: The switch build credibly aligns with the stated optics/cable requirement, especially on cable count and 2 x LW optics per switch, but the exact 12 SW populated / 14 licensed state is not explicitly enumerated in the visible lines.

tension_with_v6: v6 was right that the Diamondback library config itself did not visibly show the 300 cartridges.
v7 changes the batch-level conclusion because the newly synced separate media quote now evidences the cartridges and VOLSER handling.
v6's SAN optics caveat remains substantially valid.
key_discrepancies: Diamondback folder name says 8xLTO10-FC, but the config shows 10 drives per system.
Tape-media folder name says NO-VOLSER, but the config content explicitly includes VOLSER characters DUM000.

diamondback.basis: directly stated in IBM TXT output

san.basis: directly stated in IBM TXT output

media.basis: directly stated in IBM TXT output

cross_document_inferred_totals.basis: combined across separate IBM config outputs

vat.summary: No VAT amount is evidenced. The spreadsheet states all prices are without taxes, such as VAT.

notes: IBM TXT note 4 says the informational totals do not reflect the prices actually paid by the customer.
The spreadsheet freight row is 0, but shipping is still represented within the section line items/subtotals.
The spreadsheet total customer price appears to be a one-time total and does not visibly include the IBM Diamondback monthly maintenance figure.
